basic_details.organization_name: Various - Industry Energy & Labour, Finance, Home, and State Government Offices
basic_details.post_name: Udyog Nirikshak, Kar Sahayak, Tantrik Sahayak, Duyyam Nirikshak (State Excise), Lipik-Tanklekhak
basic_details.application_mode: Online only via MPSC portal: https://mpsconline.gov.in
basic_details.short_information: MPSC Maharashtra Group-C Main Exam 2025 notification out for 1884 vacancies. Check eligibility, fees, and apply online for Udyog Nirikshak, Kar Sahayak, Clerk posts before 4 June 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Marathi typewriting speed minimum 30 words per minute AND English typewriting minimum 40 words per minute and pass in Government Commercial Certificate Examination OR equivalent examination recognized by Maharashtra Govt. (For Lipik-Tanklekhak: Marathi min. 30 wpm OR English min. 40 wpm and Government Commercial Certificate). Typing qualification must be held on or before application last date.

salary_details.pay_scale: As per Maharashtra Government pay rules applicable to respective post/service

selection_process: Written Main Examination (2 Papers, 400 marks) + Document Verification. Lipik-Tanklekhak: merit list + Appointing Authority-wise preference order
how_to_apply: Candidates shall apply online through the MPSC portal (https://mpsconline.gov.in) only. No other mode of application will be accepted. Before applying, candidates must ensure they have qualified the Group-C Prelim 2025 and completed KYC on the MPSC portal. Detailed application instructions are available at https://mpsconline.gov.in and https://mpsc.gov.in.
seo_tags: MPSC Group C Services Main Exam Notification Out - Apply Online for 1884 Posts
